title: Anora
logline: A Brooklyn sex worker's impulsive Vegas marriage to a Russian oligarch's son turns into a nightmare when his powerful family intervenes to annul the union.
antagonistOrConflict: The Zakharov family and their enforcers trying to annul her marriage

actBreaks.description: Ani and Ivan impulsively get married in Vegas, completing the fantasy phase

validation.ruling: Scene 57 effectively ends Act 1 by launching Ani into her fantasy week with Ivan. The montage shows the transition from her normal strip club life to living as Ivan's kept woman, establishing the new status quo before everything goes wrong.

actBreaks.description: Toros arrives at the mansion and the violent confrontation begins, starting the nightmare

validation.ruling: Scene 145 at the mansion confrontation is the true end of Act 2, where all the major players converge and the stakes are fully established. Scene 107 is too early and doesn't represent the completion of the second act's rising action. The mansion standoff launches the final act's search and resolution.

actBreaks.description: Final scene - Ani left alone on the street after the ordeal

validation.ruling: Scene 184 works as Act 3 break, showing Diamond's opportunistic move on Ivan at the club. However, this feels more like setup for the final resolution rather than a major structural break. The scene effectively transitions from the search to the final confrontation phase.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: Classic three-act structure with fairy tale setup turning into nightmare thriller
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: Act 1 is seductive and dream-like with quick montages. Act 2 explodes into violence and becomes relentless pursuit. Act 3 maintains intensity through the search and annulment process.

incitingIncident.description: Jimmy introduces Ani to Ivan, a young Russian client at table twelve. Ani demonstrates her reluctant but functional Russian skills, creating immediate chemistry and humor between them.

validation.ruling: Scene 17 is the clear inciting incident where Ani meets Ivan, the wealthy Russian client who will transform her life. This meeting at the strip club sets the entire story in motion - their connection leads to the week-long arrangement, the impulsive Vegas marriage, and all subsequent consequences. The scene establishes the central relationship and catalyst for the narrative.

midpoint.description: Ivan tries to physically block the door while Garnik forces his way in. Garnik reveals he was sent by Ivan's father through Toros to investigate the marriage rumors.

validation.ruling: Scene 106 is the true midpoint - when Garnik forces his way into the mansion and reveals he was sent by Ivan's father to investigate the marriage rumors. This is the moment Ani's fantasy week collapses and reality intrudes. The brief Scene 107 (elevator shot) is just a transition. Scene 106 marks the dramatic reversal from Ani's high point to the beginning of her ordeal.

climax.description: Ani receives a text that Ivan is at Headquarters, immediately energizing the exhausted search team.

validation.ruling: Scene 185 is the true climax - when Ani receives the text that Ivan has been found at Headquarters. After the entire grueling search sequence, this moment resolves the central dramatic question and propels us toward the final confrontation. Scene 173 (bath house search) is just another step in the search montage, not the climactic moment.

scenes.summary: Ivan and Ani lounge intimately on leather couches, toasting vodka in Russian. When Ivan asks about outside work, Ani gives him her phone number.

scenes.summary: Garnik and Igor drive to the mansion discussing tabloid reports about Ivan marrying a prostitute. Garnik worries about the consequences while Igor dismisses it as tabloid nonsense.

scenes.summary: Garnik and Igor arrive at the mansion on a cold winter day and ring the doorbell, preparing to confront Ivan about his marriage.

scenes.summary: Ivan and Ani are interrupted mid-intimacy by the doorbell. Ivan recognizes Garnik through the window and panics, refusing to let them in while Ani is confused about being called a 'guest.'

scenes.summary: Garnik uses a key card to open the mansion door when Ivan refuses to let them in, escalating the confrontation.

scenes.summary: Ani sits uncomfortably with Igor in the living room. When Igor introduces himself, Ani asserts her identity as Ivan's wife, establishing her position.

scenes.summary: Ivan and Garnik walk down the hallway to the office where the marriage documents are kept, building tension toward the revelation.

scenes.summary: Ivan shows Garnik the marriage license as proof. Garnik photographs it on Toros's orders, not the parents', revealing the chain of command in the family operation.

scenes.summary: During a baptism ceremony, Toros receives the photo of the marriage license and screams 'No!' in front of the entire church congregation, disrupting the sacred ceremony.

scenes.summary: Ivan tries to dismiss Garnik and Igor while Garnik waits for instructions from Toros. The power struggle intensifies as Ivan demands they leave his house.

scenes.heading: 81 INT. ARMENIAN CHURCH - ALTAR - DAY 81 81
scenes.summary: Toros abandons the baptism ceremony, handing the child to his wife and apologizing to the priest before rushing out to handle the Ivan crisis.

scenes.summary: Toros calls Ivan's parents from the church backroom, confirming the marriage is real. The parents scream so loudly Toros has to hold the phone away from his ear.

scenes.heading: 82 INT. MANSION - LIVING ROOM - DAY 82 82
scenes.summary: Ani asserts her authority over the enforcers, telling them they work for Ivan and should leave when he asks. The confrontation escalates with competing claims of authority.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - DOORWAY/FOYER - DAY B85

scenes.summary: Ani explodes at being called a hooker while Ivan defends her as an 'erotic dancer.' Toros launches into a Russian tirade about Ivan's irresponsibility while everyone listens awkwardly.

scenes.summary: Toros races through traffic while hearing the chaos at the mansion through his car speakers, trying to maintain control of the rapidly deteriorating situation.

scenes.heading: 89 INT. MANSION - LIVING ROOM/FOYER - DAY 89 89
scenes.summary: Ivan grabs his phone to leave while Ani protests about leaving 'their house.' Igor blocks Ani's path as Ivan hits the gate button and abandons her.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ivan abandons Ani, leaving her with the enforcers - major betrayal

scenes.heading: 90 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 90 90
scenes.summary: Toros panics in his car hearing Ivan say goodbye and screams for the others to stop Ivan from leaving, but it's already too late.

scenes.heading: 91 INT. MANSION - FOYER - DAY 91 91
scenes.summary: Garnik orders Igor to keep Ani in the house while he chases Ivan. When Igor grabs Ani's shoulder to stop her, she warns him not to touch her.

scenes.heading: 92 INT. MANSION - DRIVEWAY - CONTINUOUS 92 92
scenes.summary: Ivan escapes through the gate while Garnik slips on ice trying to chase him, falling down and shouting Ivan's name in frustration.

scenes.heading: 93 INT. MANSION - FOYER/FAMILY ROOM - CONTINUOUS 93 93
scenes.summary: Ani fights back against Igor, striking him with her left hand. Her wedding ring cuts his cheek, drawing first blood in their physical confrontation.

scenes.heading: 94 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 94 94
scenes.summary: Toros hears Ani screaming through the phone speaker and demands to know what's happening, showing his loss of control over the situation.

scenes.heading: 95 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 95 95
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor's fight intensifies, destroying furniture including lamps and vases as Ani fights like 'a wild banshee' while Igor tries to subdue her.

scenes.heading: 96 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 96 96
scenes.summary: Toros speeds around corners while hearing the violent struggle, screaming into his phone asking if they're killing Ani and demanding they stop.

scenes.heading: 97 EXT. MANSION/STREET - DAY 97 97
scenes.summary: Garnik gives up chasing Ivan and returns, limping from his fall. The security guard casually asks about Ivan's 'tantrum,' suggesting this behavior is normal.

scenes.heading: 98 INT. MANSION - FOYER/FAMILY ROOM - DAY 98 98
scenes.summary: Igor pins Ani to the couch and ties her wrists with a phone cord while she screams and struggles. Garnik enters and is shocked by the chaos.

scenes.heading: 99 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 99 99
scenes.summary: Toros nearly hits a child while distracted by the chaos he's hearing through his car speakers, showing how the situation affects everyone involved.

scenes.heading: 100 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 100 100
scenes.summary: Ani kicks Garnik square in the face, breaking his nose and sending him crashing through the glass coffee table, escalating the violence and destruction.
scenes.turningPointNote: Peak violence as Ani severely injures Garnik - maximum physical confrontation

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS A101
scenes.summary: Garnik stumbles to the kitchen to find ice for his broken nose, showing the aftermath of Ani's violent resistance.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - CONTINUOUS B101
scenes.summary: Ani tries to negotiate with Igor, claiming she won't run and asking him to stop hurting her, but Igor refuses to release her.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS C101
scenes.summary: Garnik settles for frozen dumplings instead of ice for his broken nose, adding dark comedy to the violent situation.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - CONTINUOUS D101
scenes.summary: Ani threatens Igor with security cameras as evidence and promises legal consequences, trying to use whatever leverage she can find.

scenes.heading: 101 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 101 101
scenes.summary: Toros pounds his steering wheel and horn in frustration while speeding down the Belt, completely losing control of the situation.

scenes.heading: 102 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 102 102
scenes.summary: Igor crushes Ani's hope by pointing out that Ivan left her, while Ani insists he went for help. Garnik reports the situation to the arriving Toros.

scenes.heading: 104 EXT. MANSION - SECURITY GATE - DAY 104 104
scenes.summary: Toros speeds up to the mansion gate and aggressively demands entry from the security guard, showing his desperation to regain control.

scenes.heading: 105 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 105 105
scenes.summary: Ani continues to insult and provoke Igor, accusing him of being aroused by restraining her, while Igor denies enjoying the situation or being paid enough.

scenes.heading: 106 EXT. MANSION - DRIVEWAY - DAY 106 106
scenes.summary: Toros arrives at the mansion, scanning his card and rushing inside to confront the chaos he's been hearing through the phone.

scenes.heading: 107 INT. MANSION - FIRST FLOOR - DAY 107 107
scenes.summary: Toros enters to find the mansion destroyed, Garnik with a broken nose, Igor restraining Ani, and no Ivan. He's in complete shock at the devastation and chaos.
scenes.turningPointNote: Toros confronts full scope of disaster - complete loss of control

scenes.heading: 108 EXT. MANSION - PATIO - MOMENTS LATER 108 108
scenes.summary: Toros smokes and makes calls arranging an emergency court hearing while Garnik spits blood in the snow, showing the aftermath of the violent confrontation.

scenes.heading: 109 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - DAY 109 109
scenes.summary: Ani sits bound and gagged while Igor apologizes and advises her to cooperate. The power dynamic has completely shifted with Ani now helpless.

scenes.heading: 110 EXT. MANSION - PATIO - DAY 110 110
scenes.summary: Toros arranges a 9 AM court meeting and tells his associate he'll 'break this broad,' showing his intention to psychologically manipulate Ani.

scenes.heading: 111 INT. MANSION - FAMILY ROOM - MOMENTS LATER 111 111
scenes.summary: Toros attempts to manipulate Ani by offering her $10,000 for cooperation, claiming Ivan betrayed everyone and framing the annulment as beneficial to her.
scenes.turningPointNote: Toros begins psychological manipulation - shift from physical to mental coercion

scenes.heading: 112 INT. MANSION - MASTER BEDROOM - DAY 112 112
scenes.summary: Ani uses the bathroom to remove her false eyelashes and wash her face while Igor waits outside, showing a brief moment of privacy and vulnerability.

scenes.heading: 113 EXT. MANSION - FRONT STEPS/DRIVEWAY - DAY 113 113
scenes.summary: Ani and the crew exit the mansion, with Toros examining passports and correcting Ani's name from Anora to Ani. Igor listens intently as cleaning staff arrive in the background.

scenes.heading: 114 EXT. MANSION/INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY - CONTINUOUS 114 114
scenes.summary: The crew loads into Toros's Escalade with Igor forced to sit in back with Ani despite her protests. Toros pays cleaning staff for the mess inside the mansion.

scenes.heading: 115 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 115 115
scenes.summary: In the car, they discuss Ivan's whereabouts while Garnik complains about needing medical attention. Igor unexpectedly apologizes to Ani for the earlier violence.

scenes.heading: EXT. BRIGHTWATER - DAY A116
scenes.summary: Igor exits a building and gives Garnik pills, who takes all three at once. They drive off to continue searching.

scenes.heading: 116 EXT. WEST 10TH ST. - DAY 116 116
scenes.summary: The Escalade encounters NYPD barricades blocking the street, forcing them to park and walk the rest of the way.

scenes.heading: 117 OMITTED 117 117
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 118 EXT. CONEY ISLAND BOARDWALK - DAY 118 118
scenes.summary: The crew walks up onto the Coney Island boardwalk heading toward the vape shop.

scenes.heading: 119 INT. VAPE SHOP - DAY 119 119
scenes.summary: At the vape shop, Crystal and Tom become suspicious of Ani's companions and refuse to help locate Ivan. The confrontation escalates when Toros becomes aggressive.

scenes.heading: 120 EXT. BOARDWALK - MOMENTS LATER 120 120
scenes.summary: Ejected from the vape shop, the crew must walk in the cold wind. Ani protests walking while Toros insists it's faster than finding parking again.

scenes.heading: 121 EXT. TATIANA’S GRILL - DAY 121 121
scenes.summary: The crew arrives at Tatiana's Grill, a Brighton Beach restaurant where they hope to find information about Ivan.

scenes.heading: 122 INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - DAY 122 122
scenes.summary: Inside Tatiana's Grill, they storm the kitchen looking for Aleks while disrupting the restaurant's atmosphere.

scenes.heading: 123 INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - KITCHEN - DAY - CONTINUOUS 123 123
scenes.summary: Aleks is overwhelmed by their aggressive questioning about Ivan's whereabouts. Toros takes Aleks's phone to call Ivan but gets voicemail, realizing Ivan is avoiding them.

scenes.heading: 124 INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - MAIN AREA - CONTINUOUS 124 124
scenes.summary: Toros commandeers the restaurant microphone and shows Ivan's photo to all customers, desperately seeking information while disrupting everyone's dinner.

scenes.heading: INT. TATIANA’S GRILL - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS A125
scenes.summary: Aleks reveals that Dasha left for the Bahamas with someone else after being inspired by Ivan's proposal to Ani, eliminating her as a lead.

scenes.heading: 125 EXT. BOARDWALK - LATE AFTERNOON 125 125
scenes.summary: Outside in harsh cold wind, the crew faces another long walk back. Ani refuses while Toros insists they must hurry before dark.

scenes.heading: 126 EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH/CONEY ISLAND BOARDWALK - MINUTES LATER 126 126
scenes.summary: During the cold march, Igor offers Ani a red scarf but she becomes suspicious about why he brought it, fearing it was meant to gag her.

scenes.heading: 127 EXT. WEST 10TH ST. - LATER 127 127
scenes.summary: Returning to find their car being towed, Toros desperately fights with the tow truck driver while threatening to call police, creating a chaotic scene.

scenes.heading: 128 INT. ESCALADE - CONTINUOUS 128 128
scenes.summary: Having apparently retrieved their car, Toros drives aggressively while boasting that nothing will stop him from finding Ivan.

scenes.heading: 129 EXT. BELT PARKWAY - DUSK 129 129
scenes.summary: The Escalade speeds along the Belt Parkway at sunset as Toros vows to search all night if necessary.

scenes.heading: 130 I/E. BRIGHTON BEACH RESTAURANTS - NIGHT 130 130
scenes.summary: Montage of the crew systematically searching Brighton Beach restaurants and bars, showing Ivan's photo to staff and patrons without success.

scenes.heading: 131 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - NIGHT 131 131
scenes.summary: In the car between searches, Igor admires Ani's coat, leading to her sharp correction that it's expensive sable, not mink.

scenes.heading: 132 I/E. BRIGHTON BEACH - NIGHT 132 132
scenes.summary: The search continues through Russian restaurants. One manager reports Ivan was there an hour ago, giving them hope they're getting closer.

scenes.heading: INT. RUSSIAN BATH HOUSE - NIGHT A133
scenes.summary: At a Russian bath house with no success, Ani finally suggests Ivan might be gaming - a key insight into his possible whereabouts.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ani provides crucial insight into Ivan's gaming habits

scenes.heading: 133 OMITTED 133 133
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 134 OMITTED 134 134
scenes.summary: Scene omitted from script.

scenes.heading: 135 EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH/CONEY ISLAND - NIGHT 135 135
scenes.summary: They search an internet cafe and billiards hall while Garnik, increasingly unwell, waits in the car.

scenes.heading: 136 INT. ESCALADE - NIGHT 136 136
scenes.summary: Garnik suddenly vomits violently in the car, causing Toros to slam on brakes and create a traffic incident.

scenes.heading: 138 EXT. BROOKLYN GAS STATION - NIGHT 138 138
scenes.summary: At a gas station, Toros cleans the car while Igor and Ani smoke awkwardly together, with Toros yelling at them for smoking near gas pumps.

scenes.heading: 139 INT. ESCALADE - NIGHT 139 139
scenes.summary: Back in the car with everyone exhausted and Garnik sick, Toros demands they hit all the clubs Ivan frequented.

scenes.heading: 140 EXT. BRIGHTON BEACH - VARIOUS CLUBS - NIGHT 140 140
scenes.summary: Systematic club search reveals they're always just missing Ivan by minutes at each location, suggesting he's on a drinking bender crawl.

scenes.heading: 141 INT. DINER - BROOKLYN - NIGHT 141 141
scenes.summary: Late night at a diner, the exhausted crew faces the reality of their failing search. Toros breaks down realizing he's more screwed than Ani by Ivan's disappearance.
scenes.turningPointNote: Toros reveals his desperation and the stakes of his situation

scenes.heading: 142 INT. HEADQUARTERS - MAIN ROOM - NIGHT 142 142
scenes.summary: At headquarters, a drunk Ivan in sunglasses arrives and is recognized by Diamond, who sees an opportunity.

scenes.heading: 143 INT. DINER - NIGHT 143 143
scenes.summary: At the diner, Toros lectures about generational entitlement while the search team grows increasingly frustrated.

scenes.heading: 144 INT. HEADQUARTERS - LOCKER ROOM - NIGHT 144 144
scenes.summary: Diamond excitedly tells other dancers that Ani's billionaire husband is at the club looking for action, seeing it as her chance.

scenes.heading: 145 INT. DINER - NIGHT 145 145
scenes.summary: Ani receives a text that Ivan is at Headquarters, immediately energizing the exhausted search team.
scenes.turningPointNote: The breakthrough moment - Ivan is found

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT A146
scenes.summary: Ivan drinks at the headquarters bar with girls flanking him as Diamond approaches aggressively.

scenes.heading: 146 INT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT 146 146
scenes.summary: Diamond gives Ivan an intense lap dance while he throws money around, clearly very drunk.

scenes.heading: 147 EXT. DINER - NIGHT 147 147
scenes.summary: The crew races from the diner to their car, with Ani noting she got ketchup on her expensive sable coat.

scenes.heading: 148 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - NIGHT 148 148
scenes.summary: In the stinking car, they tear out of the parking lot racing toward Headquarters.

scenes.heading: 149 EXT. BQE - NIGHT 149 149
scenes.summary: The Escalade races through the night on the BQE toward the final confrontation.

scenes.heading: 150 INT. HEADQUARTERS - PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT 150 150
scenes.summary: Ivan's lap dance continues in a private room as Diamond suggests going upstairs while he continues spending money.

scenes.heading: 151 EXT. BROOKLYN BATTERY TUNNEL - NIGHT 151 151
scenes.summary: The crew drives through the Brooklyn Battery Tunnel, moments away from finding Ivan.

scenes.heading: 152 EXT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT 152 152
scenes.summary: The crew arrives at Headquarters and rushes inside for the confrontation.

scenes.heading: 153 INT. HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT 153 153
scenes.summary: Inside Headquarters, Lulu informs Ani that Ivan is upstairs with Diamond. Ani storms through the club with the crew behind her, searching private rooms.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS PRIVATE ROOM - CONTINUOUS A154
scenes.summary: They find Ivan in a private room with Diamond. Ani tries to explain what happened while Ivan, very drunk, seems disconnected and amused by the situation rather than concerned.
scenes.turningPointNote: The confrontation with Ivan reveals his indifference to Ani's ordeal

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - KITCHEN - CONTINUOUS B154
scenes.summary: Jenny alerts management that Ani is causing a scene with three men in the club.

scenes.heading: 154 INT. HEADQUARTERS - OFFICE - CONTINUOUS 154 154
scenes.summary: In the office, Jenny warns Jimmy about the disturbance involving Ani and the Russian men.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - PRIVATE ROOM / THROUGH CLUB - CONTINUOUS 155.1
scenes.summary: Toros drags Ivan out while Ani desperately tries to connect with him emotionally. Diamond follows, taunting Ani about Ivan's plans to return to Russia.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - STAIRS - CONTINUOUS 155.2
scenes.summary: On the stairs, Diamond continues her vicious taunts about Ivan wanting 'one last bang' before leaving for Russia, while the crew tries to maintain control.

scenes.heading: INT. HEADQUARTERS - MAIN FLOOR / FRONT ENTRANCE - CONTINUOUS 155.3
scenes.summary: Near the exit, Diamond's final taunt about calling the two-week marriage correctly triggers Ani to explode into violence, tackling Diamond and starting a massive brawl involving everyone.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ani's breaking point - all her suppressed rage and humiliation explodes into violence

scenes.heading: EXT. HEADQUARTERS - 552 W. 38TH ST. - NIGHT A156
scenes.summary: The crew loads into the Escalade with Toros forcibly placing Ivan between Garnik and Igor in the back, and shoving Ani into the front seat.

scenes.heading: INT. ESCALADE - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS B156
scenes.summary: In the Escalade, Ani desperately tries to make the unconscious Ivan understand that his family is forcing their divorce, while Toros confirms the deal is 10K for her to walk away, despite her protests that this wasn't the agreement.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ani realizes she's been betrayed and the divorce is happening regardless of her wishes

scenes.heading: 156 EXT. COURTHOUSE - CENTER STREET - NIGHT 156 156
scenes.summary: The Escalade parks in front of the courthouse at night where Toros settles in to wait, while Ani stares out the window looking lost and Igor observes her distressed state.

scenes.heading: 157 EXT. COURTHOUSE - CENTER STREET - MORNING 157 157
scenes.summary: Morning arrives at the courthouse as Toros wakes everyone except the still-intoxicated Ivan, with Ani promising Ivan she'll handle the situation as they prepare to exit.

scenes.heading: 158 EXT. COURTHOUSE - DAY 158 158
scenes.summary: Outside the courthouse, Toros gives Garnik strict instructions to watch the car while family lawyer Michael Sharnov greets them, immediately noticing Ivan's intoxicated state and expressing concern.

scenes.heading: 159 INT. COURTHOUSE - ROTUNDA - DAY 159 159
scenes.summary: Walking through the courthouse rotunda, Sharnov expresses concern in Russian about Ivan's condition and threatens his license, but Toros intimidates him by questioning his loyalty to the Zakharov family.

scenes.heading: 160 INT. COURTHOUSE - COURTROOM - LATER 160 160
scenes.summary: In the courtroom, Sharnov begins annulment proceedings claiming duress, but Ani erupts with profanity, denying duress and declaring that neither she nor her husband consent to the annulment, causing a scene before the judge.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ani makes her final stand in court, openly defying the annulment proceedings

scenes.heading: 161 OMITTED 161 161
scenes.summary: Omitted scene.

scenes.heading: 162 EXT. COURTHOUSE - STEPS - DAY 162 162
scenes.summary: On the courthouse steps, Toros has a breakdown realizing they got married in Vegas, complicating the annulment, while Ani insists Ivan proposed to her, and Toros weeps about the parents arriving in two hours.

scenes.heading: EXT. TORO’S ESCALADE - DAY A163
scenes.summary: Toros violently pulls Garnik from the driver's seat and tells him the Vegas marriage has complicated everything before the crew piles back into the Escalade.

scenes.heading: 163 INT. TOROS’ ESCALADE - DAY 163 163
scenes.summary: They drive in tense silence with Toros crying until Ivan suddenly vomits on himself, causing Igor and Garnik to panic while Toros expresses complete indifference to Ivan's condition.

scenes.heading: 164 EXT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - DAY 164 164
scenes.summary: The Escalade arrives at the private airport and parks in front of the hangar entrance.

scenes.heading: 165 OMITTED 165 165
scenes.summary: Omitted scene.

scenes.heading: 166 EXT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - TARMAC - DAY 166 166
scenes.summary: The Zakharov private jet lands and as the parents disembark past customs agents with a sniffer dog, Toros greets them and nervously tells Nikolai he has more bad news.

scenes.heading: 167 INT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - TERMINAL - DAY 167 167
scenes.summary: Galina storms into the terminal and confronts the drunk, vomit-stained Ivan in Russian, expressing disgust and embarrassment while Ani slowly approaches them.

scenes.heading: 168 EXT. PRIVATE AIRPORT - TARMAC - DAY 168 168
scenes.summary: Galina drags Ivan toward the plane at a swift pace, cursing everyone as idiots and threatening Toros's job, while Ani calls after Ivan who finally turns and coldly confirms they're getting divorced when she desperately asks.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ivan directly confirms the divorce to Ani, crushing her last hope

scenes.heading: INT. PLANE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ivan boards the plane and takes his seat while Galina asks where Ani is.

scenes.heading: EXT. TARMAC - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Galina descends to confront Ani, demanding she board for the divorce, but Ani threatens to get a lawyer and sue for half without a prenup, prompting Galina to threaten to destroy Ani's life and her family's lives.
scenes.turningPointNote: Galina makes deadly threats against Ani and her family, forcing compliance

scenes.heading: 169 INT. GULFSTREAM G650 - DAY 169 169
scenes.summary: Mid-flight on the lavish Gulfstream, the exhausted crew is spread throughout while Ivan's parents continue berating him, Igor offers Ani vodka and awkwardly attempts to toast, and Ani takes the shot without acknowledging his gesture.

scenes.heading: 170 EXT. AIRPORT - LAS VEGAS - LATE MORNING 170 170
scenes.summary: The group arrives in Las Vegas and gets into two black SUVs on the tarmac.

scenes.heading: 171 I/E. SUV - DAY 171 171
scenes.summary: They drive through Las Vegas in the SUVs.

scenes.heading: 172 EXT. RAPID DIVORCE CENTER - PARKING LOT - DAY 172 172
scenes.summary: The SUVs pull into the parking lot of a rapid divorce center.

scenes.heading: 173 INT. RAPID DIVORCE CENTER - DAY 173 173
scenes.summary: At the rapid divorce center, Ivan signs the annulment papers without hesitation while Ani watches in disgust, and when Igor suggests Ivan should apologize, Galina refuses to allow any apology.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ivan signs the divorce papers without a second thought, finalizing the end of their marriage

scenes.heading: 174 EXT. RAPID DIVORCE CENTER - DAY 174 174
scenes.summary: Outside the divorce center, Toros gives Ani designer sunglasses and arranges for Igor to take her to the airport, telling her she can stay at the house one night but must leave in the morning, and thanks her before going back inside.

scenes.heading: 175 I/E. SUV - DAY 175 175
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor drive through Las Vegas to the airport in complete silence.

scenes.heading: 176 INT. COMMERCIAL AIRPLANE - DAY 176 176
scenes.summary: On a cramped domestic flight back to New York, Ani sleeps while a baby cries and Igor covers her with his jacket as they prepare for landing.

scenes.heading: 177 EXT. LAGUARDIA AIRPORT - CURB - DUSK 177 177
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor take a taxi from LaGuardia Airport as the sun sets.

scenes.heading: 178 INT. MANSION - MASTER BATHROOM - NIGHT 178 178
scenes.summary: Ani takes a shower in the mansion's gorgeous master bathroom, looking around and reflecting that it was nice while it lasted.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - LIVINGROOM - NIGHT 178A
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor smoke a blunt together in the living room while watching news about an approaching snowstorm, sharing awkward conversation about Igor's missed 30th birthday and the meaning of their names, with Ani being characteristically harsh toward Igor.

scenes.heading: 180 INT. MANSION - MASTER BEDROOM - NEXT MORNING 180 180
scenes.summary: Ani wakes up in the master bedroom to snow falling outside creating a winter wonderland, then packs her belongings including clothes, photos, and toiletries.

scenes.heading: INT. MANSION - LIVINGROOM - LATER A181
scenes.summary: Igor slowly awakens on the couch and sees the falling snow outside.

scenes.heading: 181 INT. MANSION - FOYER/DOORWAY - LATER 181 181
scenes.summary: Ani and Igor leave the mansion with her three large pieces of luggage, opening the door to discover it's snowing.

scenes.heading: 182 EXT. BANK - DAY - LATER 182 182
scenes.summary: At the bank in the continuing snow, Igor and Ani complete the money transfer with a bank teller.

scenes.heading: 183 EXT. ANI’S APARTMENT/INT. IGOR’S CAR - DAY 183 183
scenes.summary: Parked outside Ani's apartment in heavy snow, Igor secretly gives Ani back her ring and helps with her luggage, but when he notices she hasn't left the car, he gets back in and they share cigarettes in silence.
scenes.turningPointNote: Igor's kindness in returning the ring and their shared silence marks their final connection

scenes.heading: 184 EXT. ANI’S APARTMENT/BROOKLYN STREET - DAY 184 184
scenes.summary: The snow continues falling around the idling car outside Ani's Brooklyn apartment as the story ends and credits roll.
